name: SCAMPER
description: Substitute, Combine, Adapt, Modify, Put to another use, Eliminate, Reverse
emergency_services_applications: Apply to equipment, processes, services, and personnel roles in fire, rescue, and emergency response

name: 5 Whys
description: Deep dive into root causes by asking 'Why?' five times
emergency_services_applications: Analyze response time issues, incident causes, training gaps, and operational challenges

name: Problem Tree Analysis
description: Map causes and effects of problems in tree format
emergency_services_applications: Visualize relationships between fire risks, response failures, and community impacts

name: Empathy Mapping
description: Understand stakeholders' thoughts, feelings, hears, sees, says/does, pains, gains
emergency_services_applications: Map experiences of citizens in emergencies, responders during incidents, and dispatchers under pressure

name: User Journey Mapping
description: Map the complete experience journey of users through a service
emergency_services_applications: Track citizen journey from emergency awareness through response to recovery

name: Persona Development
description: Create detailed profiles of different user types
emergency_services_applications: Develop personas for elderly in fires, children in disasters, responders, and community members

name: Classic Brainstorming
description: Generate ideas freely with quantity focus, no criticism
emergency_services_applications: Free-form idea generation for any emergency services challenge

name: Brainwriting
description: Written idea generation where participants write silently before sharing
emergency_services_applications: Good for teams where verbal participation is uneven or hierarchy inhibits sharing

name: Random Word Stimulation
description: Use random words to spark creative connections
emergency_services_applications: Break patterns by connecting unrelated words to emergency services challenges

name: SCAMPER for Services
description: Apply SCAMPER framework specifically to service delivery
emergency_services_applications: How can we SCAMPER our emergency response service, dispatch, or prevention programs?

name: Reverse Brainstorming
description: Solve problems by asking 'How might we cause this problem?'
emergency_services_applications: Understand vulnerabilities by imagining how to create the problems we're trying to prevent

name: Assumption Busting
description: Challenge fundamental assumptions about how things work
emergency_services_applications: What assumptions about emergency response are no longer true? What can we stop doing?

name: Pre-Mortem Analysis
description: Imagine the innovation has failed and analyze why
emergency_services_applications: Plan for failure scenarios before implementing new emergency services innovations

name: Systems Mapping
description: Map the emergency services ecosystem and interactions
emergency_services_applications: Visualize connections between fire, EMS, police, utilities, hospitals, and community resources

name: STEEP Analysis
description: Social, Technological, Economic, Environmental, Political factors
emergency_services_applications: Analyze external factors affecting emergency services future planning

name: PESTLE for Emergency Services
description: Political, Economic, Social, Technological, Legal, Environmental factors
emergency_services_applications: Comprehensive external analysis for strategic emergency planning

name: Scenario Planning
description: Develop multiple plausible future scenarios
emergency_services_applications: Create scenarios for climate change impacts, technology disruption, or demographic shifts

name: Role Storming
description: Imagine solutions from different stakeholder perspectives
emergency_services_applications: What would a firefighter chief do? A city mayor? A citizen? A tech entrepreneur?

name: Worst-Case Ideation
description: Generate solutions for best responses to worst-case scenarios
emergency_services_applications: Plan for major disasters by imagining ideal responses to catastrophic events

name: Lean Canvas for Emergency Services
description: Business model canvas adapted for public safety services
emergency_services_applications: Map emergency service value propositions, channels, customer segments, and cost/revenue structures

name: Design Thinking Sprint
description: 5-day sprint methodology adapted for emergency services
emergency_services_applications: Accelerated innovation process: Understand, Define, Ideate, Prototype, Test

name: MVP Canvas
description: Identify minimum viable solutions for emergency innovations
emergency_services_applications: What is the smallest version of this idea that we can test quickly?

name: SWOT for Emergency Services
description: Strengths, Weaknesses, Opportunities, Threats analysis
emergency_services_applications: Comprehensive organizational assessment for emergency services

name: Impact-Effort Matrix
description: Prioritize ideas based on impact vs effort
emergency_services_applications: Quick wins vs strategic bets for emergency innovation

name: Now-Wow-How-Never
description: Categorize ideas into Now (do first), Wow (exciting but hard), How (need to find way), Never (avoid)
emergency_services_applications: Prioritization framework specifically designed for emergency services constraints

name: Crazy 8s Ideation
description: Generate 8 ideas in 8 minutes
emergency_services_applications: Quick ideation sprint for emergency equipment, processes, or communication ideas

name: Mind Mapping
description: Radial diagram connecting ideas to central theme
emergency_services_applications: Visual exploration of emergency services challenges and potential solutions

name: Affinity Diagram
description: Group large numbers of ideas into themes
emergency_services_applications: Organize many generated ideas into categories like Technology, Training, Process, Equipment

name: MoSCoW Prioritization
description: Categorize by Must do, Should do, Could do, Won't do
emergency_services_applications: Prioritize emergency innovations by feasibility and impact

name: Nominal Group Technique
description: Silent idea generation followed by group discussion
emergency_services_applications: Structured process ensuring all voices are heard in diverse emergency services teams
